label: needs_policy
rationale: data-table-postgres really queries pg_attribute, and the reviewed manifest has no resource declaration model for this database catalog access. Round 9 guidance treats resource findings as policy-review candidates rather than detector suppressions.
method: Reviewed disagreements, both blind labels, evidence row, Remix source at packages/data-table-postgres/src/lib/adapter.ts lines 136-140, and the reviewed manifest resources/governance.

label: needs_policy
rationale: remix-the-scripts really reads pnpm-workspace.yaml with fs.readFileSync, but the reviewed manifest corpus does not yet model file-resource allowances. This needs explicit resource policy rather than a detector change.
